title: RpgDifficulty
description: Strengthen mobs over distance and/or time
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/nVYNqth.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/RpgDifficulty/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/RpgDifficulty/issues)


This mod increases the health and damage of mobs over time and distance. Highly configureable. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/3RIauKg.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
